title: schisandra henryi subsp. hoatii
intro: Schisandra henryi subsp. hoatii, also known as Chinese five-flavor berry, is a plant species in the Schisandraceae family and is classified as a type of schisandra plant. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schisandra henryi subsp. hoatii include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced immune function, and potential anti-aging effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to prepare teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are also commonly used in modern herbal preparations.
